notes: Solid breakout implementation with good paddle angle control and proper game states, but brick collision only checks ball center point (not radius) which can cause missed hits, and the ball can clip through the paddle at high speeds due to the nested else-if structure in the bounce logic.
Solid implementation with minor flaws: the rightmost column of bricks is slightly cut off due to incorrect padding/offset math, and side-collisions on bricks incorrectly reverse vertical momentum.
A competent basic Breakout clone, but collision and life-loss logic are simplistic/inaccurate enough to noticeably hurt gameplay quality.
